name: Magically Moist Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush the chicken on all sides with mayonnaise.
2. Place the bread crumbs in a large plastic food bag.
3. Add the chicken one piece at a time; shake to coat well.
4. Arrange the coated chicken on a rack in a broiler pan.
5. Bake in a 425 degree oven for about 40 minutes or until golden brown and tender.
